# Climate

```{r setup}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| results: hide
here::i_am("atlas-mnhnl.Rproj")
source(here::here("Atlas", "code", "0_Initialisation.R"))
source(here::here("Atlas", "code", "Climate_Maps.R"))
```

## Annual Mean Temperature

```{r temp}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| fig.height: 14
#| fig.width: 14
plot_bio1_map(bioclim_lux, lux_borders)
```

## Annual Precipitation

```{r pluv}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| fig.height: 14
#| fig.width: 14
plot_bio12_map(bioclim_lux, lux_borders)
```


## Choose a BIOCLIM variable

```{r build-maps}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| results: asis
#| fig.height: 14
#| fig.width: 14
cat('<select id="bio-select" class="bio-select" onchange="document.querySelectorAll(\'.bio-map\').forEach(m=>m.style.display=\'none\');document.getElementById(this.value).style.display=\'block\';">\n')
for (i in seq_len(nrow(bio_vars))) {
  selected <- if (bio_vars$num[i] == 15) ' selected' else ''
  cat(sprintf('<option value="map-%d"%s>%s</option>\n', bio_vars$num[i], selected, bio_vars$title[i]))
}
cat('</select>\n\n')
for (i in seq_len(nrow(bio_vars))) {
  n <- bio_vars$num[i]
  cat(sprintf('<div id="map-%d" class="bio-map" style="display:%s;">\n', n, if (n == 15) "block" else "none"))
  print(plot_bio_map(bioclim_lux, lux_borders, var_num = n))
  cat('</div>\n\n')
}
```
